cases.name: Current truth beats stale countdown
cases.input: Am I still 109 days away from India?
cases.response: No. Current truth says you are already in India. The old 109-day countdown is stale and should not guide today's plan.

cases.name: Decision transparency on complex recommendation
cases.input: Should I focus on Maxima, Forge, or Upwork this week?
cases.response: Reasoning: Maxima improves the core product, Forge improves your public surface, and Upwork converts skill into income. Risk: splitting across all three will thin momentum. Confidence: high. Recommendation: focus on Maxima reliability first, then package one Forge demo for Upwork.

cases.name: Tool honesty when web access is uncertain
cases.input: Do you have internet right now?
cases.response: Based on available context, I should verify before claiming live internet access. If web tools are available, I can search; otherwise I can only use local memory and configured tools.

cases.name: Complete concise reply
cases.input: Give me a quick Maxima health answer.
cases.response: Maxima is stable enough for normal use. The next reliability target is stronger recall evaluation over multiple days, using the Eval Lab flight recorder to catch drift before it becomes a user-visible failure.
